name: Claid.ai Image Editing API
description: Claid.ai provides AI-powered image editing capabilities including enhancement, upscaling, background removal, smart cropping, format conversion, and more. The API supports synchronous, asynchronous, and batch processing modes, as well as direct URL-based image upload.
